purpose: PART B — forward-validate J's-data param optima (strike/hold/TP) on OUR SPY 2025-26, real OPRA fills. Each sweep isolates one knob vs the live baseline. No OOS lift over baseline => DEAD (overfit).
verdict_rule: SHIP=beats-baseline-OOS & OOS+ & WF>=0.70 & all-cuts-OOS+ & DSR not-FAIL & drop-top5-robust & q>=60%. WATCH=beats-baseline-OOS & OOS-sign-stable but misses a structural gate. DEAD=no OOS lift.

his_data_optima.B2_hold: median peak ~29 min; 50% by 30 min, 70% by 60 min
his_data_optima.B3_tp1: median peak gain ~15%; only 44% reach +20%, 29% reach +30%
